steps.t: Following the death of their chieftain, Hrungrod, at the hands of the dwarves, the heirs of Thyrstáth have pledged themselves into the service of Hrím…
Fallen under the sway of Hrímil Frost-heart's voice, Thrall-lord Dushtalbúk leads the Orcs of Gundabad in defending the Hiddenhoard of Abnankâra.
After suffering an unexpected defeat atop Mount Gundabad, Hrímil Frost-heart, the Herald of Winter, retreated to the Hiddenhoard of Abnankâra to tend …
